name: Agent-run recovery for senolytics coverage repair lifecycle run
summary: Recovers the prior self-healing lifecycle-repair agent run from partial to succeeded for its bounded scope after the repair candidate was created and post-run export/verification completed; unresolved senolytics coverage evidence findings remain tracked as downstream candidate work.

scope.question: Recover the self-healing candidate-revision agent-run record for senolytics coverage repair without promoting any candidate or changing underlying evidence records.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded agent-run recovery candidate and records that no promotion or underlying evidence mutation was performed.
Aligns the target agent_run status and blocking issue ledger with the completed bounded lifecycle-repair scope while preserving downstream evidence-review limitations as next action context.
